source_title: What's the difference between Microsoft Copilot (free) and Copilot in Microsoft 365
claim: Microsoft describes separate Copilot experiences for free users, individual Microsoft 365 subscribers, and Microsoft 365 business users, with usage limits applying to individual subscription features.
research_implication: Supports treating Microsoft Copilot as a bundled/platform AI case rather than a pure standalone AI-to-C subscription.
